'''farate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:onced|onced]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:onced|onced]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| farate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:farate|farate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:faratesher|faratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faratesherĂ«m|faratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:faratero|faratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:farateshĂ«|farateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:farateshĂ«m|farateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifaratero|gokifaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifarateshĂ«|gokifarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifarateshĂ«m|gokifarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofarankerom|gofarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofarankeshĂ«|gofarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofarankeshĂ«m|gofarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofarankeya|gofarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:faraterom|faraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:faratemu|faratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:farateya|farateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifaraterom|gokifaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifaratemu|gokifaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifarateya|gokifarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fararate|fararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fararatesher|fararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fararatesherĂ«m|fararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fararatero|fararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fararateshĂ«|fararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fararateshĂ«m|fararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifararatero|gokifararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifararateshĂ«|gokifararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifararateshĂ«m|gokifararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofararankerom|gofararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofararankeshĂ«|gofararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofararankeshĂ«m|gofararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofararankeya|gofararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fararaterom|fararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fararatemu|fararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fararateya|fararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifararaterom|gokifararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifararatemu|gokifararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifararateya|gokifararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠte|fĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠtesher|fĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠtero|fĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠrĂŠtero|gokifĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠterom|fĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠtemu|fĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠrĂŠteya|fĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠrĂŠterom|gokifĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠrĂŠteya|gokifĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafrafte|fafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafraftesher|fafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafraftesherĂ«m|fafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafraftero|fafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafrafteshĂ«|fafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafrafteshĂ«m|fafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafraftero|gokifafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafrafteshĂ«|gokifafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafrafteshĂ«m|gokifafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafrafnkerom|gofafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafrafnkeshĂ«|gofafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafrafnkeshĂ«m|gofafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafrafnkeya|gofafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafrafterom|fafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafraftemu|fafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafrafteya|fafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafrafterom|gokifafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafraftemu|gokifafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafrafteya|gokifafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
